form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 520m in 29.89 last start, beating Eventuate. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in that last win. Stay with her.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd in a Special conditions H on April 10 over 520m at this track behind Paw Fabian beaten half a length (29.89). Has ability and can run well.
